text.title: Growth Affiliate Marketing Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when in doubt about which variant to apply.

decision-tree.root-question: Do all Applies-If preconditions hold and no Skip-If trigger fires?

conclusion.verdict: do not run this methodology; document skip rationale
cap commission <= 25% LTV first year; <= 30% lifetime
add written disclosure clause + quarterly audit
score affiliates by audience match + engagement
launch program; quarterly audit + monthly fraud review

text.example: preconditions=true → readiness gates evaluated → all_checks_pass==true → conclusion ref=fraud-detection-active
